top_signals.title: Pacific MR Economics Drive Regionalisation between Basins
top_signals.summary: The resumption of tanker transits via the Strait of Hormuz has helped restore crude flows to non-China Asian buyers, supporting a recovery in refinery runs across Northeast Asia. top_signals.title: US launches fresh strikes as Iran closes Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: The US said it launched a fresh wave of strikes on Iran after Tehran struck a ship passing through the Strait of Hormuz. top_signals.title: Dry Bulk Shipping: Capesize Market Extends Recovery Phase
top_signals.summary: Capesize The market enjoyed another constructive week, extending the recovery that gathered pace at the end of the previous week despite a brief period of midweek consolidation. top_signals.title: Project completed: 5G campus network enhances automated terminal operations at CTA in Hamburg
top_signals.summary: A powerful 5G campus network has gone into operation at Hamburger Hafen und Logistik AG’s (HHLA) Container Terminal Altenwerder (CTA). HHLA has implemented the infrastructure in collaboration with Deutsche Telekom and Ericsson as part of the PROCON-5G project.
